MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FOX PAINE & COMPANY, LLC, FOX PAINE CAPITAL FUND II GP, LLC, FOX PAINE CAPITAL MANAGEMENT II, LLC, FOX PAINE CAPITAL INTERNATIONAL GP, L.P., FOX PAINE INTERNATIONAL GP, LTD., FOX PAINE INTERNATIONAL LPH, L.P., FOX PAINE INTERNATIONAL LPH GP, LTD., LLC, SAUL FOX's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE of Jeremy Vest is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
